name: hos-tracker
description: HOS Tracker — Truck Hours of Service

scripts.build: cp index.html www/index.html && cp manifest.json www/manifest.json && cp icon-192.png www/icon-192.png && cp icon-512.png www/icon-512.png && cp sw.js www/sw.js
scripts.sync: npm run build && npx cap sync
